description: C-BESD (child acted, Malay) vs CREMA-D (adult acted, English) — combined age+language+recording shift
dataloaders: get_dataloaders(['c-besd']) train vs get_dataloaders(['crema-d']) train, 300 samples each, seed=42
note: This is NOT C-BESD vs FAU Aibo. FAU Aibo FD needs separate computation.
